# Unified Delivery Traceability Matrix

**Document ID**: TRACEABILITY-MATRIX
**Version**: 2.1
**Date**: 2026-03-11
**Generated By**: Claude (Release Engineer)
**Covers**: All FRs (FR-001 through FR-082), NFRs (QW-1 through QW-5, ME-1 through ME-9, LE-1 through LE-3, D-5 through D-7), DIST (FR-DIST-01 through FR-DIST-09)

|--------|---------|

| âťŚ | Missing â€” no source or test coverage found |

## Notes on Remaining âš ď¸Ź Items (13)

All 13 partial items fall into **two categories that cannot be automated with pytest**:

### Category 1: Electron/Desktop Features (8 items)
FR-019 (App Launch), FR-020 (Backend Lifecycle), FR-021 (Health Check via Electron), FR-022 (Splash Screen), FR-023 (Graceful Shutdown via Electron), FR-024 (System Tray), FR-029 (Shared Chromium â€” abandoned), FR-030 (Log Capture), FR-081 (Electron-Only Distribution)

**Reason**: These run in the Electron main process (Node.js). The Python test suite cannot test Node.js code. Requires Spectron or Playwright for Electron E2E tests.

### Category 2: Frontend UI Rendering (5 items)
FR-012 (SocketIO real-time), FR-014 (Dashboard rendering), FR-017 (Settings rendering), FR-039 (Warning banner rendering), FR-064 (Schedule UI), FR-077 (LLM config UI)

**Reason**: Backend API endpoints are fully tested. The frontend JavaScript modules render HTML dynamically â€” testing requires Playwright browser automation against the running app. The API contracts are verified; only the DOM rendering logic is untested.

**Note**: FR-027 (No-Browser Flag) is also âš ď¸Ź because the flag was removed when the app became Electron-only (FR-081). The functionality no longer exists but the requirement remains for historical traceability.
